description: Worked inputs and expected outcomes. Use to validate agent application of rules.json without one-shot guessing.

examples.idea: Every driver needs an app for route notes
examples.why: Process not written. Daily + multiple people, but exceptions on every stop. Standardize checklist before any app.
examples.vending_lens: Group text + shared Sheet for 90 days. App after columns stop changing.

examples.idea: Build a dashboard that pulls Dex files automatically
examples.why: One owner, weekly tabular data, stable steps. Sheet with import folder beats custom dashboard.
examples.vending_lens: Drop CSVs into Drive folder; Sheet pivots by machine. Dashboard when 3+ people need live view daily.

examples.idea: AI auto-reply to all customer complaint emails
examples.why: Customer stakes + judgment on tone and remedy. Use mf-tpl-001 templates; human sends.
examples.vending_lens: Wrong auto-reply on refund demand = review bomb. Template + log sheet first.

examples.idea: Buy inventory SaaS for warehouse par levels
examples.why: Written weekly process, small team. Sheet with par columns and driver checkboxes until sheet breaks.
examples.vending_lens: Drivers already text photos. Sheet + checkbox column beats $200/mo SaaS for 2 routes.

examples.idea: Custom bot that texts owner when machine reports error
examples.why: Daily, large team, stable alert rules, money at stake, existing tools do not wire telemetry to SMS cleanly.
examples.vending_lens: Start with email alerts from telemetry vendor. Custom only if alerts are ignored.

examples.idea: Scheduling app for 4 part-time route fillers
examples.why: Exceptions every holiday and swap request. Shared calendar + coverage rules doc before software.
examples.vending_lens: Group text + Google Calendar free blocks. App when 6+ staff across sites.

examples.idea: Automate quarterly sales export for accountant
examples.why: Rare, one person, low stakes if late by a day. Calendar reminder + checklist enough.
examples.vending_lens: 4 exports per year. Not worth script maintenance.

examples.idea: ChatGPT plugin to respond to Google reviews
examples.why: No volume data and no written voice. Log 90 days of reviews; draft templates by tier first.
examples.vending_lens: Count reviews/month. Under 4: owner replies manually with 2 template variants.

examples.idea: Nothing yet, just drivers forgetting machine checks
examples.why: Pure guess on failure rate. Log missed checks and shrink for 90 days before tooling.
examples.vending_lens: Laminated truck checklist costs $2. Data first, then sheet if misses persist.

examples.why: Stable intake, low judgment, known SaaS category. Typeform/Tally + sheet export.
examples.vending_lens: QR on machine sticker → form → weekly Sheet tab. No custom app.

examples.why: High volume, many users, money stakes, no off-shelf fit after sheet phase.
examples.vending_lens: Only after Notion/Sheet phase fails at permissions or mobile offline.
